name: Senia
tagline: Three-Michelin-star trained chef running two experiences under one roof — casual a la carte downstairs, elite 8-seat Chef's Counter upstairs.
mustOrder: Chef's Counter tasting menu (Fri/Sat only, reserve weeks ahead)
any dessert — pastry chef Michelle Karr-Ueoka trained at Per Se and French Laundry
parking: Street parking on King/Nuuanu; paid lots on Smith St
talkStory: Opened 2016 by Chef Anthony Rush and pastry chef Michelle Karr-Ueoka, both with decades under Alan Wong. Anthony trained in multiple three-Michelin-starred kitchens. The a la carte dining room is approachable and buzzy — come here on a weeknight for a great meal without the ceremony. The real move is the 8-seat Chef's Counter (Fri–Sat only) — a multi-course tasting menu that's one of the best dining experiences in Hawaii. Book weeks in advance. Won Hale 'Aina Gold for Best Tasting Menu. Tue–Sat dinner only.
